evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG chatbot reduced ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features)

evidence.claim: Launch of recommendation system improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Expertise in Learning to Rank, Elasticsearch, Vector Search
evidence.source_text: Learning to Rank (expert, 53mo), Elasticsearch (expert, 88mo), Vector Search (expert, 48mo)

evidence.claim: Owns the evaluation framework for RAG features
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Believes most retrieval problems are evaluation problems
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning through shipping real systems
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
